rulings.Case Title: VINOD KRIPALANI et al VS. PAUL MARTIN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause Why Judgment Debtors Paul Martin And Sharon Yost, Jointly And Severally, Should Not Be Held In Contempt
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, January 23, 2014, line 1. Order To Show Cause Why Judgment Debtors Paul Martin And Sharon Yost, Jointly And Severally, Should Not Be Held In Contempt Continued to February 7, 2014. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of the Notice of Motion to Hold Respondents in Contempt. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of the response. Courtesy copies must be delivered to department 501 no later than January 22, 2014 by 4 p.m. with cover letter reflecting new hearing date. The Court is in receipt of the Memorandum of Points and Authorities in Support of Motion, Declaration of Stephen Porter and Reply. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HENRIETTA MARTIN VS. DAVID DEMO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defts Responses To Pltf'S Special Interrogatories, And Requests For Production Of Documents;
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, January 23, 2014, line 2. PLAINTIFF HENRIETTA MARTIN's Motion To Compel Defendant's Responses To Plaintiff's Special Interrogatories, And Requests For Production Of Documents Transferred to Department 302 to be heard by judge pro tem on February 4, 2014 at 9:00 a.m. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PAGE GROUP, LLC VS. THE BANNER DEVELOPMENT COMPANY, et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, January 23, 2014, line 3. DEFENDANT THE BANNER DEVELOPMENT COMPANY, 1140 PAGE ST, LLC and MICHAEL CASSIDY's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT GRANTED with leave to amend to allege facts showing malice oppression or fraud as to each defendant. Moving party and its attorney is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C in future. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KEVIN KEATING VS. JOSEPH R. OMRAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Or Modify Subpoenas
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, January 23, 2014, line 4. PLAINTIFF KEVIN KEATING's Motion To Quash Or Modify Subpoenas GRANTED. Per Plaintiff's agreement no evidence shall be introduced at trial/motion for summary judgment regarding any treatment sought or received for plaintiff's alleged personal injuries. No sanctions. = (501/REQ)
